name: Payment Processor / ACH Fraud Actors
description: Payment Processor and ACH Fraud Actors are financially motivated criminal groups focused on manipulating wire transfers, ACH payments, payroll systems, vendor payments, and treasury workflows for direct monetary theft. Rather than deploying ransomware, these actors target finance teams, treasury ...
strategic_objectives: Redirect legitimate ACH and wire transfers to attacker-contr
Compromise treasury approval workflows for fraudulent paymen
Abuse vendor payment systems and invoice processing
